title:
Open data events with Pia Waugh
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Open data events with Pia Waugh

## We recently held two events with Pia Waugh for agencies and industry, on open data in New Zealand - both events were well attended, and included demos of beta.data.govt.nz functionality.
Pia gave presentations outlining her thoughts on the broad data agenda across New Zealand, with some recommendations, suggestions drawing on successes from government open data release across the Tasman.
Encouraged and energised by these events, we continue to work through beta testing the new service and platform proposition, eliciting feedback from the user community throughout.
Now is your chance to give us your feedback on the beta.data.govt.nz platform – take a few minutes to tell us about your needs and expectations.

### Download event material
Pia’s presentation material is available to download below:
- Agency event presentation
- Industry event presentation
Working with Open Data and Information Programme partners and government agencies, data.govt.nz is making open government data easier to find and use.
